news_items.headline: Rushing single in 11th gives Dodgers 60th win
news_items.summary: In their first extra-innings game of the season, the Dodgers reach win No. 60 on a Dalton Rushing single in the 11th.

news_items.headline: 'It was personal': Irked Schlittler bounces back
news_items.summary: Bouncing back from a disappointing loss to the Detroit Tigers, Cam Schlittler pitched eight innings for the second time this year as the New York Yankees defeated the Tampa Bay Rays 5-1 on Monday in the series opener.

news_items.headline: Kepler hits first home run since 80-game ban ended...
news_items.summary: Veteran outfielder Max Kepler, 33, homered to lead the Arizona Diamondbacks to an 8-0 victory over the San Diego Padres on Monday night, his first home run since returning from an 80-game suspension for testing positive for a performance-enhancing drug.

news_items.headline: Sanchez allows career-worst 9 ER in Phils' loss
news_items.summary: Philadelphia ace Cristopher Sanchez allowed a career-worst nine earned runs in just 3 1/3 innings in the Phillies' surprising 15-1 loss to Kansas City on Monday afternoon, telling reporters that the Royals "made me pay, and you just have to keep going."

news_items.headline: Braves' Martín Pérez on injury list, DFA Carrasco
news_items.summary: The Braves placed left-hander Martín Pérez on the 15-day injured list on Monday with a left forearm contusion.

news_items.headline: Dodgers' Phillips back from Tommy John surgery
news_items.summary: Reliever Evan Phillips was reinstated off the injured list Monday, returning to the Los Angeles Dodgers 13 months after having Tommy John surgery.
